calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day having been assigned from the Presiding Judge, Dept 206 for Entry of Default Prove-Up. NO appearance by or on behalf of the Defendants.
Department 514, Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk Rani Edwards; Reporter: Mitch Lyon # 6840

Appearing for Plaintiff: Charles Ramsey, Esq.
NO appearance by or on behalf of the Defendants.

Witnesses Annette Allen and Barry Levy were duly sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff by Charles Ramsey

Oral motion to dismiss "Doe" defendants was granted; Plaintiff to file Dismissal of Doe Defendants today

exhibits introduced and admitted into evidence

After testimony and evidence presented, Court ordered the following Judgment be entered in favor of Plaintiff Freedom West Homes and against Defendants S.P.O.A, 4 Excellent Security Services, a California business entity; Leonard Priestly; Tempi Priestly and James "Jimmy" Priestly as follows:
Principal: $47,781.00
Costs: to be determined
Pre-interest Judgment : to be determined
Total Judgment: ( Principal + Costs + Interest )= $
Judgment - pending - to be submitted to D514 by 9/19/17

all exhibits were ordered returned to plaintiff

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Continued To Dec-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES RAMSEY, TEL. NO. 1-510-682-5600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEONARD PRIESTLY AND TEMPI PRIESTLY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The first amended complaint adequately alleges claims for breach of contract and negligence and the face of the complaint does not disclose that the claims are within the jurisdiction of the small claims division. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Continued To Oct-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS TEMPI PRIESTLY and LEONARD PRIESTLY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed on June 24, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Charles Ramsey of Law Office of Charles Ramsey telephone number 210-682-5600 for Plaintiff Freedom West Homes.
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TEMPI PRIESTLY and LEONARD PRIESTLY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled without prejudice to being re-filed and served in accordance with Code of Civil Procedure 1005. Plaintiff's objection to the untimely service of the demurrer is sustained. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
